hb42e9fa4gc84cg413dg9480g56f8d99f36d9: Ain't polite to stare, worm-wart. If you ain't got the guts to get branded, clear off.
h9f51af76g9183g484ag8cccgf027a4f52965: Any goblin that tries to brand me loses their hand.
haaee9e00gb3a8g4183gab2fgff6abce6fbdb: Didn't mean no offence! Brand lets us know you're on our side is all.
h257770a7g137ag4d4dgaa3fg5f3f811c6504: Ain't just a mark on the flesh: it's magic. Only them what follows the Absolute can see it.
ha6a6ae6fg8093g47ccgbaecg85cef1debdd1: You'd dare presume to mark my flesh?
hfeb5e4dfgf4e9g4851g87bagfd344c939445: Hold out your hand, revealing the mark of the Absolute seared into your flesh.
hdbe595a9gce34g440dg8cfdgcbc48c66c290: Oof. Priestess got you good. Tha's a lovely bit of work.
h28592a89ga5afg4fa7g905egeee1f3aecb23: I'll be marked soon, don't worry.
hdc76496cgba0fg440bgadc1g357fb9187618: Priestess'll sort you out. Only thing she likes more than prayin' is burnin' folk...
ha2c45e37g845dg4bddgaf5fgab66be46b2eb: Why would I let anyone scar me for life?
ha4fddcebgfb71g44a4g8b3cg3f6622161125: Ain't just a mark on the flesh: it's magic. Only them what follows the Absolute can see it.
h20ea98d4g4833g4408g88adg7b8696e6a91f: Let's us know you're on our side. That way, nobody'll mess with ya.
hdfa23455g689eg49ffg9adcg163a5a8cebab: I have more guts than most. Brand me.
ha2694d4agbe21g48f7g8796g190c37f6195b: Pleasure to have met ya. Praise the Absolute!
